name: Hustronix Approve & Post to LinkedIn
description: Slack approve 1|2|3 → auto-publish short LinkedIn post. Repo: hustronix35-prog/hustronix-content-ops

prompts.text:
When Slack message matches approve 1, approve 2, or approve 3:

1. Run: python scripts/slack_approve_and_post.py "{message}"
2. Reply in thread with confirmation or error
3. Requires LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN + LINKEDIN_AUTHOR_URN in automation secrets

Repo: hustronix35-prog/hustronix-content-ops branch master
Do not rewrite post text — publish stored option as-is.
